Clementi or Geylang? 

Clementi flats sit at $598k and are climbing 3.9% a year. Geylang is $580k and softer at -5.9%, so there's room to bargain. Different plays, both real.

posts.caption:
Resale flats in Clementi just clocked 713 sales last year.
Median sitting at $598k, up 3.9% over twelve months.
Steady demand, mature estate, schools everywhere. People want in.
Thinking of selling? This is a good window.

posts.caption:
Affordable second home? Let's talk reality.

A citizen buying a 2nd home at $1.65M pays 20% ABSD.

That's about $330k cash, on top of the price. Plan for it before you fall in love with the place.

The CPF Housing Grant can give you up to $80k.
And that's before EHG, Proximity or EC perks stack on top.

posts.caption:
Myth: the price you offer is the price you can borrow on.

Not true. Your loan and CPF only stretch to the bank's valuation.
Offer above it and that gap comes straight out of your own pocket.

link in bio

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #homeloan #cpf #bankvaluation #buyersg
